Alright, so now that we've gone through two of the three Abandonments, we went through the Browse Abandonment, the Cart Abandonment, this last one is called the Abandoned Checkout. Running through some of the clavius data on thousands of stores even though it's the most popular to do a percentage off percentage off actually with the lowest performer in terms of both open rate and then the revenue per recipient which might be surprising the highest performing incentive was actually a dollar off so trial testing a dollar off discount instead of just always using the percentage off according to Shopify doing a dollar based discount versus a percentage

based discount can help increase your conversion by 175% which is a huge number with some businesses and might do better other businesses might do about the same other businesses might do worse but ## [09:06 - 09:39]

clients you know two hour time delay for abandoned check out works better than four hours and then for others you know the inverse is true for hours 10s work better than two hours so it's always great to test subject lines as well as the time delays and all the other things I mentioned to make sure you're optimizing performance.
